chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 321 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 12.12.2023 Mr. Gulshan Ahmed Shjrah, Associate of Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
